profile_backed_target.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-profile-pass160 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5

lever.summary: Blocked Cholesky now applies A22 -= L21 * L21^T only to lower-triangle entries consumed by later panels.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zu5kh-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

after.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zu5kh-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: The diagonal block factorization and panel solve loops are unchanged. Each consumed Schur entry still accumulates panel columns in ascending c order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: No comparisons, pivots, or tie-breaking decisions were introduced or reordered.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: For lower-triangle entries consumed by subsequent panels, multiply-add order matches the prior full GEMM product. Strict upper-triangle Schur entries are skipped because Cholesky never consumes them and zeroes them before return.
isomorphism_proof.error_surface: Shape, dtype, non-square, complex, and non-positive-definite error paths are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.nan_surface: Consumed lower-triangle NaN propagation follows the same ascending dot-product order as before.

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zu5kh-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zu5kh-check cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zu5kh-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.result: failed on pre-existing unrelated linalg.rs formatting outside this pass; no whole-file formatting was applied
exit 1 for pre-existing file-wide inventory, including test panic macros, unwrap/expect, and direct indexing; UBS fmt/clippy/check/test-build sections were clean and no unsafe blocks were reported

fallback: If a future parity regression appears, revert this commit to restore full trailing-matrix GEMM Schur updates.
next_profile_note: Re-profile linalg after this keep because Cholesky is no longer the same bottleneck shape.
